settings.title: What’s Included in the Pack?
settings.content:
• Premium Wax Pearls 19 oz
  • Strong Essential Oil
  • Cotton Wicks Specially designed for a clean, consistent flame.
  • Instruction Manual Simple steps to make the most of your pearled candle

settings.title: Ingredients
settings.content:
100% Plant-Based Wax - Clean-burning, non-toxic, and free from paraffin.

Premium Fragrance Oils - Thoughtfully curated for a balanced, long-lasting scent.

Phthalate-Free Fragrances - Luxurious, non-toxic scents crafted to enhance your mood.

settings.title: Burn Time
settings.content:
19 oz Candle: Our 19 oz candles are provided with 20 wicks.

Each Wick burns for 12 hrs.

settings.title: How To Use
settings.content:
Trim the Wick - Before lighting, trim the wick to 1/4 inch for a clean, even burn.

Burn Safely - Keep the candle on a flat, heat-resistant surface, and never leave it unattended.

settings.title: Why You’ll Love It
settings.content:
Customizable & Refillable - Adjust wax levels, mix colors, and blend scents.

Mess-Free & Even Burning - No tunneling, no wasted wax.

Long lasting - A candle you can keep using forever.

{% comment %} Featured Column Section - Mobile View Step-by-step process for using candle pearls {% endcomment %}

Step To Use Your Pearls

Follow these simple steps to create your perfect candle experience

Step 1: Pour

Gently pour the pearled wax into your candle holder, filling it up to your desired level.

Step 2: Insert Wick

Place the wick into the wax pearls, ensuring it's upright and centered for an even burn.

Step 3: Drop Fragrance

Add a few drops of essential oil from our collection onto the candle pearls.

Step 4: Light

Ignite the wick and enjoy a clean, slow-burning candle experience.

settings.text: Pour wax pearls into your holder.
Add a few drops of oil.

settings.heading: How to Use
settings.intro_text: Four simple steps to create a clean, calming candle experience.

settings.title: 1-POUR
settings.text: Gently pour the pearled wax into your candle holder, filling it up to your desired level. The beauty of pearled candles is that you control how much you use!

settings.title: 2-INSERT
settings.text: Place the wick into the wax pearls, ensuring it's upright and centered for an even burn.

settings.title: 3-DROP
settings.text: Add a few drops of essential oil from our collection onto the candle pearls. As the pearls warm, the fragrance gently infuses the air, creating a serene, aromatic atmosphere that soothes your senses.

settings.title: 4-LIGHT
settings.text: Ignite the wick and enjoy a clean, slow-burning candle experience. Watch as the pearls melt into a smooth, glowing pool of wax.

settings.custom_liquid:
Why Choose Vibes Pearl Candles?

This is us

Non Toxic
Even Burning
Pet Friendly
Soothing

This is not us

Synthetic Toxins
Short lifespan
Harmful for Pets
Soot & Smoke

settings.title: 1. How do Vibes Pearled Candles work?
settings.content: Our Pearled candles are designed for customization and sustainability. Simply pour the Pearls into a heat-resistant container, insert the wick, and light it. As the Pearls melt, they create an even burn. Once used, just add more Pearls and trim the wick to keep your candle going.

settings.title: 2. Are the pearled candles refillable?
settings.content: Yes! Unlike traditional candles that burn down and get tossed, our pearled candles can be refilled indefinitely. Just top up with fresh Pearls, replace the wick, and continue enjoying your candle.

settings.title: 3. What are the wax Pearls made from?
settings.content: Our candles are crafted from 100% plant-based wax, making them non-toxic and eco-friendly. We use lead-free cotton wicks and mild, high-quality fragrance oils to create a clean, balanced scent without overpowering your space.

settings.title: 4. How long do the candles burn?
settings.content:
Our 11 oz candles are provided with 15 wicks, while the 18 oz candles are provided with 30 wicks.

Each Wick burns for 12 hrs.

settings.title: 5. Why can’t I smell the fragrance when burning?
settings.content: Our fragrances are designed to be subtle and calming, not overpowering. If you’re having trouble smelling the scent, try burning the candle in a smaller room or ensuring the wax pool is fully melted.

settings.title: 6. Are your pearled candles safe for pets?
settings.content: Yes, our candles are made with non-toxic ingredients, but we recommend keeping them out of reach of pets and never leaving a burning candle unattended.

settings.title: 7. Do your pearled candles produce soot?
settings.content: Not at all! Our pearled candles burn cleanly without soot, thanks to our high-quality Pearls and cotton/wood wicks.

settings.title: 8. Where can I buy pearled candle refills?
settings.content: You can get additional Pearls, wicks, and accessories directly from our website!

settings.title: 9. Are the pearled candles safe to use?
settings.content:
Absolutely! Our pearled candles have clean ingredients that produce minimal to no smoke. Just follow basic candle safety:

  • Keep away from flammable objects
  • Don’t leave burning candles unattended
  • Trim the wick to 5mm before each use

settings.title: 10. Do you offer international shipping?
settings.content: Currently, we ship within the USA, but we’re working on expanding internationally. Stay tuned!

settings.custom_liquid:
Frequently Asked Questions

Our Pearled candles are designed for customization and sustainability. Simply pour the Pearls into a heat-resistant container, insert the wick, and light it. As the Pearls melt, they create an even burn. Once used, just add more Pearls and trim the wick to keep your candle going.

Yes! Unlike traditional candles that burn down and get tossed, our pearled candles can be refilled indefinitely. Just top up with fresh Pearls, replace the wick, and continue enjoying your candle.

Our candles are crafted from 100% plant-based wax, making them non-toxic and eco-friendly. We use lead-free cotton wicks and mild, high-quality fragrance oils to create a clean, balanced scent without overpowering your space.

Our 11 oz candles are provided with 15 wicks, while the 18 oz candles are provided with 30 wicks.

Each Wick burns for 12 hrs.

Our fragrances are subtle and calming, not overpowering. We recommend burning in smaller rooms or ensuring the wax pool fully melts for the best scent throw.

Yes! Our candles are made with non-toxic ingredients, making them pet-safe. However, we recommend keeping them out of reach of pets and never leaving a burning candle unattended.

No! Our pearled candles burn cleanly without soot, thanks to our high-quality Pearls and cotton/wood wicks.

Get additional Pearls, wicks, and accessories directly from our website!

Absolutely! Our candles are made with clean ingredients that produce minimal to no smoke. As with any candle, keep them away from flammable materials, never leave them unattended, and trim the wick to 5mm before lighting.

Currently, we ship within the USA only. We are working on expanding our shipping options internationally - stay tuned!
